about.headline: We Don't Just Market — We Drive Sales
about.description: BrightnessAI is a results-first digital marketing agency. We specialize in Ecommerce Marketing, Social Media Marketing, Meta Ads, and Growth Hacking. Our strategies are built around one goal: generating real revenue for your business.
about.mission: To empower Indian businesses with world-class digital marketing that delivers measurable ROI.
about.vision: To become India's most trusted sales-oriented digital marketing partner for growing businesses.

whyUs.title: Sales-First Approach
whyUs.description: Every campaign is optimized for conversions, not vanity metrics. We measure success in rupees.

whyUs.title: Data-Driven Decisions
whyUs.description: We use analytics, A/B testing, and performance data to continuously improve your results.

whyUs.title: Industry Expertise
whyUs.description: Deep experience in Ecommerce, D2C brands, and local service businesses across India.

whyUs.title: Transparent Reporting
whyUs.description: Weekly reports with clear metrics. No jargon, just numbers that matter to your business.

services.title: Ecommerce Marketing
services.description: Boost your online store sales with Amazon listing optimization, Flipkart management, and targeted product ad campaigns.

services.title: Social Media Marketing
services.description: Build an engaged audience and convert followers into customers with strategic content and community management.

services.title: Meta Ads
services.description: Precision-targeted Facebook and Instagram ad campaigns that generate leads and sales at the lowest cost per acquisition.

services.title: Growth Hacking
services.description: Unconventional, data-backed strategies to rapidly scale your business across multiple digital channels.

ecommerce.name: Business
features: Full A+ Content & Brand Store design

portfolio.description: Scaled IlearnPlace's Instagram from 800 to 15,000 followers in 6 months. Launched Meta Ads campaigns that reduced cost per lead by 55% and increased course enrollments by 3x.
Set up Ramu Kaka's Amazon & Flipkart stores from scratch. Optimized 30+ product listings, launched sponsored campaigns, and achieved Best Seller badge in 4 months.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.review: BrightnessAI transformed our digital presence completely. Our course enrollments tripled and our ad spend became 2x more efficient. Vikash and his team truly understand results-driven marketing.

testimonials.name: Ramesh Kumar
testimonials.review: Mujhe Amazon pe kuch pata nahi tha. BrightnessAI ne sab setup kiya aur ab hamara monthly revenue 8 lakh ho gaya hai. Best decision of my business life!

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.review: Their Meta Ads strategy is on another level. We went from spending ₹50K/month with no ROI to generating ₹5L in sales on the same budget. Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Amit Gupta
testimonials.review: Professional team, transparent reporting, and genuine results. BrightnessAI helped us establish a strong presence on Flipkart and Instagram simultaneously.

legal.terms: These terms govern your use of BrightnessAI's services. By engaging our services, you agree to our payment terms (advance payment), deliverable timelines, and confidentiality agreements. We reserve the right to modify service scope with mutual consent. All campaigns are subject to platform policies.
legal.privacy: BrightnessAI collects business information, contact details, and campaign data solely for service delivery. We never sell your data to third parties. All client business information is kept strictly confidential. We use cookies on this website for analytics and user experience improvement.
legal.refund: Due to the nature of digital marketing services (time and resources invested upfront), we offer a 7-day satisfaction review period. Partial refunds may be issued for unused deliverables within the first month. No refunds after 30 days of service commencement.
